summary: Property tax refund processing time roughly doubled after fiscal 2023 because DOF added extra review steps to fight a wave of fraudulent refund claims — over 800 suspicious claims worth more than $3 million were caught in late 2023 and early 2024, and the agency tightened identity-theft and fraud checks further the following year. DOF's Fiscal 2026 preliminary report says processing time has since come down as staff became more familiar with the new fraud-screening process.

sources.label: NYC Department of Finance, Fiscal 2024 Mayor's Management Report
